goals.title: Inspect repository baseline
goals.objective: Record branch, status, missing expected docs, and current log before changing product code.
goals.evidence: Branch multica-P0-T01-worktree-baseline. git status --short --branch before artifact commit showed only untracked .omx/ created by this workflow; no pre-existing dirty production files in this checkout. Expected .omx/plans/production-release-master-plan-2026-06-10.md and docs/release/handoff-2026-06-10-current-state.md are absent.

goals.title: Preserve or shelve current work
goals.objective: If dirty production files exist, split them into Lore commits or explicit patch artifacts by lane; if none exist, record that clean baseline.
goals.evidence: No pre-existing dirty production files were present after Multica checkout and branch creation. No shelved patches required. Current preserved changes are limited to .omx planning/ultragoal artifacts for this baseline task.

goals.title: Publish review evidence
goals.objective: Commit workflow artifacts, open a PR if possible, and hand off to QA with required status/log evidence.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json for PER-3 / P0-T01; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail; do not edit product code unless dirty production files are discovered; finish with Git status/log evidence and QA handoff.
